SEARCH
Package grafioschtrader.algo.strategy.model.alerts

Class MaCrossingAlert

java.lang.Object
grafioschtrader.algo.strategy.model.alerts.MaCrossingAlert
public class MaCrossingAlert extends Object
Configuration for a moving-average crossing alert (security level only). The alert fires when the security's last price crosses above or below the specified moving average. The indicator is computed from the most recent period daily closing prices loaded from the history-quote table.

Evaluated by Tier 2 (scheduled indicator evaluation) because it requires historical price data.
